title: Explicit insufficient mana error
description: When a summon cannot be performed because the player lacks resources, return a clear ERROR instead of silently failing or returning a generic response.
target_area: server summon validation and client error display
success_criteria: Resource shortage returns MessageTypes::Error with a meaningful code such as NOT_ENOUGH_MANA.
Client output recognizes and displays the resource shortage error.
No persistence, match, or project configuration files are modified.
risk_points: Changing resource deduction order can introduce negative resources.
Client error mapping can drift from server error codes.
